channel.title: Yorkshire Food & Drink Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events in the Food & Drink category.

item.title: Darley Street Market Quiz Night
item.description: bradford.markets@bradford.gov.uk
item.location: 16 - 24 Darley Street Kitchen, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3HH

item.title: Jim Moir: Neo Fauna
item.description: Step into the imaginative world of Jim Moir, the celebrated British artist, AKA Vic Reeves at Cartwright Hall, Bradford.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Extraordinary Portraits With Bill Bailey
item.description: Following its success in 2025, Extraordinary Portraits with Bill Bailey returns to The Loading Bay in Bradford. All six original artworks from the hit BBC One series will be on display at this free exhibition.
item.location: Loading Bay, 1 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.ify:location: Loading Bay, 1 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Cecil Beaton: Staging Icons,
item.location: Harewood House, Harewood House Estate, Harewood, Leeds, LS17 9LF, United Kingdom

item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Scarborough 400 giant deckchair trail
item.description: Take a seat back in time and discover the history of Britain’s original seaside resort as we celebrate 400 years since the discovery of Scarborough’s spa…
item.location: Scarborough, North Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Scarborough, North Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Wildlife Photography for Beginners at Staveley Nature Reserve
item.description: Join our resident photographer for a wildlife photography for beginners workshop.
item.location: Staveley nature reserve, Staveley nature reserve, Boroughbridge, North Yorkshire, HG5 9LQ
item.ify:location: Staveley nature reserve, Staveley nature reserve, Boroughbridge, North Yorkshire, HG5 9LQ
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Step Right Up to the Summer of Fun
item.description: This summer, The Broadway is bringing all the excitement of the fairground indoors with six weeks of FREE family fun!
item.location: Broadway Bradford, Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JR
item.ify:location: Broadway Bradford, Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Victorian Baking
item.location: Ripon Workhouse & Garden Museum, 75 Allhallowgate, Ripon, North Yorkshire, HG4 1LE
item.ify:location: Ripon Workhouse & Garden Museum, 75 Allhallowgate, Ripon, North Yorkshire, HG4 1LE
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Romeo & Juliet - Ripon Racecourse
item.description: Two hearts. One fate. A timeless love reborn.The Dukes Theatre Company… Two hearts. One fate. A timeless love reborn.The Dukes Theatre Company presents Shakespeares Romeo and Juliet, a bold reimagining of the iconic…
item.location: Ripon Racecourse, Ripon Racecourse, Boroughbridge Road, HG4 1UG
item.ify:location: Ripon Racecourse, Ripon Racecourse, Boroughbridge Road, HG4 1UG
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Brick Builders Club - The Rotunda Museum
item.description: Build, design and let your imagination run wild in our fun, hands-on brick building sessions inspired by the museum’s fascinating collections. Whether…
item.location: The Rotunda Museum, The Rotunda Museum, Vernon Road, Scarborough, YO11 2PS
item.ify:location: The Rotunda Museum, The Rotunda Museum, Vernon Road, Scarborough, YO11 2PS
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Pride at the Crags
item.description: Discover the beginnings of Happy Valley Pride in Gibson Mill this July.
item.location: Hardcastle Crags, Hebden Bridge, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Hardcastle Crags, Hebden Bridge, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Shanes’ Singo Live
item.description: bradford.markets@bradford.gov.uk
item.location: 16 - 24 Darley Street Kitchen, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3HH
item.ify:location: 16 - 24 Darley Street Kitchen, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3HH
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Summer River Workshops at Rowntree Park
item.description: Join sculptor and ceramicist Sarah Schiewe for a creative, family-friendly clay workshop inspired by York’s rivers, flooding history, and climate resilience. In this hands-on workshop, participants will create their own unique air-dry clay fish — a “river messenger” carrying stories, memories, and imagined journeys fro
item.location: Rowntree Park, Rowntree Park Lodge, Richardson St, York YO23 1JU
item.ify:location: Rowntree Park, Rowntree Park Lodge, Richardson St, York YO23 1JU
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings

item.title: Baildon Farmers Market
item.description: Baildon Farmers Market is a monthly food market that’s rated one of the finest in the UK, and the best in Yorkshire!
item.location: Lower Ian Clough Car Park, Browgate, Baildon, West Yorkshire, BD17 5LA
item.ify:location: Lower Ian Clough Car Park, Browgate, Baildon, West Yorkshire, BD17 5LA
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Live Music: Dan Loops
item.description: bradford.markets@bradford.gov.uk
item.location: 16 - 24 Darley Street Kitchen, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3HH
item.ify:location: 16 - 24 Darley Street Kitchen, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3HH
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Be Like Blippi
item.description: Catch the all‑new Be Like Blippi Tour live at Bradford Live, bringing Blippi and Meekah to the stage for an interactive family adventure.
item.location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.ify:location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Yorkshire Day Market and Seaside Fun Zone, York
item.description: Yorkshire Day is coming to Parliament Street with a market brimming with the county's best independent makers and producers. From 30 July to 2 August, browse handcrafted goods, local treats and Yorkshire food and drink while soaking up the atmosphere in the city centre. There's a Seaside Fun Zone too, with a pop-up san
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings

item.title: Real Markets at Lotherton
item.location: Lotherton, Leeds Museums and Galleries | Days out and exhibitions
item.ify:location: Lotherton, Leeds Museums and Galleries | Days out and exhibitions
item.dc:creator: Leeds Museums and Galleries

item.title: What's on in Doncaster
item.description: We’ve put together a busy schedule of events for all ages, covering arts and culture, live events in Doncaster, sport, shopping, eating, and drinking.
item.location: coming back for more. Doncaster really does have it all! Tourist Information Centre 1 Priory Place Doncaster DN1 1BL
item.ify:location: coming back for more. Doncaster really does have it all! Tourist Information Centre 1 Priory Place Doncaster DN1 1BL
item.dc:creator: Visit Doncaster

item.title: Yorkshire Day at Bradford Industrial Museum
item.description: Yorkshire Day at Bradford Industrial Museum brings live music, Morris dancing, family activities, a visiting horse, and the vibrant Made By Many Hands Makers Market together for a lively summer celebration.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Bradford City Mela
item.description: Bradford City Mela returns with music, dance, food and culture across City Park, plus a community stage at Darley Street Market celebrating local talent and creativity.
item.location: City Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.ify:location: City Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Scissor Sisters
item.description: Scissor Sisters + BIMINI & THE HIDDEN CAMERAS Halifax will sizzle next summer as Scissor Sisters are bringing their iconic glam-pop spectacle to the town. The multi-award-winning American pop band will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Sunday 9 August for a night of high-energy anthems, dazzling perfo
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
